body: Issue.from_path (models.py:33-35) falls back to reading a 'status' field from the JSON before using the directory name as canonical state. Since directory-as-state is the established model (T-8, closed), this fallback is misleading: a JSON file in issues/open/ with status='closed' would be loaded as closed. Remove the legacy path and always derive state from the parent directory name. This is a minor breaking change for any hand-edited files that relied on the inner status field.
title: Remove legacy 'status' field fallback in Issue.from_path
